narrative:
Precinct Fostoria 1-A (precinct in Seneca County) has 909 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
